title: Triphylius the bishop.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Triphylius, bishop of Ledra or Leucotheon, in Cyprus, was the most eloquent man of his age, and was distinguished during the reign of Constantius.
I have read his Commentary on the Song of Songs.
He is said to have written many other works, none of which have come to our hand.
